name: Suny Cellular Communication Ltd
summary: Suny Cellular Communication Ltd imports and distributes cellular devices, tablets, and accessories. It provides repairs, spare parts, and telephone technical support for cellular devices, tablets, as well as related accessories produced by the Samsung Electronics Co. Ltd. The company sells its products through a network of 20 stores of Samsung brand, as well as online through its Website. The company was formerly known as Scailex Corporation Ltd. and changed its name to Suny Cellular Communication Ltd in November 2016. Suny Cellular Communication Ltd was founded in 1971 and is based in Petah Tikva, Israel.
